title: VG TEST-GOALS.md frontmatter (v1)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a phase TEST-GOALS.md per SPEC-E section 4.4. Body validation (one H2 per goal matching '## G-XX: <title>', goal count consistency, per-goal frontmatter blocks, optional interactive_controls validating against interactive-controls.v1.json) handled by verify-artifact-schema.py.
